seo.title: Hetzner vs Contabo vs OVH
seo.description: A practical comparison of Hetzner, Contabo, and OVH for VPS Hosting (Hetzner, etc.).

content.intro: Comparing VPS providers for developers prioritizing European infrastructure, cost control, and deployment flexibility. Focus on trade-offs between setup complexity, regional compliance, and long-term scalability.

options.name: Hetzner
options.tagline: European infrastructure with transparent pricing and hardware customization
options.best_for: Developers requiring EU-based servers with high bandwidth and dedicated hardware options

options.name: Contabo
options.tagline: Budget-friendly VPS with flexible payment models
options.best_for: Startups testing workloads with low upfront costs and monthly billing

options.name: OVH
options.tagline: Enterprise-grade solutions with global data center coverage
options.best_for: Teams needing hybrid cloud capabilities and DDoS protection

options.name: DigitalOcean
options.best_for: Solo developers prioritizing ease of use over regional customization

criteria.name: Cost Profile
criteria.description: Monthly pricing for base 4GB/100GB SSD plan

criteria.name: Setup Complexity
criteria.description: Time to provision and secure server

criteria.name: Lock-in Risk
criteria.description: Ease of migrating to other providers

verdict.summary: No single provider excels across all criteria. Hetzner offers the best EU infrastructure at mid-range prices, while Contabo provides lowest costs for basic workloads. OVH balances enterprise features with European presence, and DigitalOcean prioritizes developer simplicity.

use_cases.reason: Lowest base pricing with acceptable EU data center coverage for initial development phases
Superior DDoS protection, enterprise-grade SLA, and hybrid cloud integration capabilities
Simplified interface with pre-configured stacks reduces setup time for basic applications
Transparent pricing model with hardware customization options for technical teams
